About

Our Philosophy

Seafood chosen with real care

We built Ocean Isle around a simple belief. That good seafood should taste of where it comes from, and reach you exactly as nature intended.

Every batch of crab is selected by hand, prepared with patience and held to a standard we are proud to put our name to. Nothing rushed, nothing masked. Clean, honest flavour, carefully sourced and delivered to kitchens in the UK, France and Spain.

Our Products

A range made for every kitchen

From the chilled aisle to the professional pass, premium crab meat that is ready when you are.

Signature

Premium Crab Meat

Select cuts from the leg and claw, renowned for their tenderness and gentle, subtly sweet flavour. Naturally high in protein and low in fat.

Super premium

White Crab Meat

The finest white meat from the body, prized for its delicate, flaky texture and clean, fresh taste.

PasteurisedChilled 0-3°CVirtually shell-freeReady to use

100 g pots for the chilled aisle. Pasteurised and ready to open, for good crab at home without any fuss.

Larger formats for professional kitchens. The same hand-picked meat, sized for service.

Hospitality & Trade

Made for professional kitchens

Ocean Isle supplies wholesalers, restaurants and caterers with crab meat that is ready the moment it arrives. No picking, no cooking, no waste. Just beautiful meat that goes straight onto the plate.

  • Ready-to-use crab meat
  • Ideal for appetisers and cold salads
  • Pasteurised for a long shelf life
  • Less waste, simple to store

Recipe Centre

Inspiration for every table

Simple to prepare, beautiful to serve. A few of our favourite ways to enjoy Ocean Isle crab.

Featured recipe

Crab timbale

Sweet crab, a little lemon and good olive oil, layered and turned out. It looks like far more work than it is.

Premium, leg and claw

When the crab is the centrepiece

Tender pieces with a gentle sweetness. Lovely in salads, timbales and starters, anywhere the crab should be seen as much as tasted.

Super premium, white

When it folds through a dish

Delicate and flaky, it carries other flavours beautifully. Made for crab cakes, pasta, quiches and anything baked.

Keep it simple
01

Open the pot. The crab is already picked, pasteurised and ready.

02

Season gently. Lemon, soft herbs and good olive oil are enough.

03

Serve chilled or just warmed through. Crab this good does not need much.

Trusted on the shelf

Chosen by leading retailers

A small range, done properly.

Read our story →
Sourcing

Looking after the sea

The Blue Swimming Crab is caught the traditional way, in pots that rest gently on the seabed and leave it undisturbed. Any females, young crabs or crabs carrying eggs go straight back to the water. It is a slower way to fish, and it is what keeps the crab coming back season after season.

We would rather do it properly than quickly. That same care goes into every pot that reaches your kitchen.

Good for you

Inside the crab

Tap a point to see what blue swimming crab naturally brings to the table.

High in protein

Crab is naturally rich in protein, the quiet kind of goodness that fits everyday cooking.

Low in fat

Light by nature. All the flavour of the sea without the heaviness.

Calcium and phosphorus

Two minerals your body uses every day, found naturally in crab meat.

Source of iron

A natural source of iron, as part of a balanced diet.

Omega-3

Like the best of the sea, blue swimming crab naturally contains Omega-3.

Good to know

Questions, answered

Yes. Every pot is fully prepared, pasteurised and shell-free, so it is ready to enjoy straight away with no picking and no cooking required.

Keep it chilled. Thanks to gentle pasteurisation our crab has a long, dependable shelf life, which means less waste for kitchens and shoppers alike.

We do. Ocean Isle supplies retailers, caterers and the hospitality trade in both retail pots and larger catering formats, with reliable delivery in the UK, France and Spain.

Our crab is found on UK shelves with retailers including Sainsbury's, Morrisons and Booths, and is now arriving across Spain, France.
